summary: Plan keeps the automerge cluster scoped to #94784, quarantines the unrelated security-sensitive historical PR #89712, preserves closed historical refs as evidence, and emits a repair artifact for the open ClawSweeper replacement PR because ClawSweeper reported repairable findings and checks were still not final.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair open PR #94784 in place for the ClawSweeper automerge loop. Keep the patch limited to the doctor cron advisory split and the focused regression tests, address the latest ClawSweeper needs-changes findings for head 7454a37abe395e2eccae97be067e3ed08054c28a, then re-run the narrow validation and request a fresh exact-head ClawSweeper review.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(doctor): repair cron shell-prompt advisory ClawSweeper findings
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair pass for Clownfish automerge on #94784.

Source and credit:
- Repairs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94784
- Preserves source PR credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94659 by @ZengWen-DT
- Tracks https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/94655

Scope:
- Keep isolated shell-prompt cron jobs out of auto-fixable doctor repair hints.
- Keep manual-only advisory output clear for SQLite-backed cron installs.
- Add or adjust focused regression coverage for the ClawSweeper findings.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/commands/doctor/cron/index.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: #94784 is a replacement for source PR #94659 because the source branch could not be updated.
Preserve attribution to original contributor @ZengWen-DT in the PR body and any final merge notes.
Keep the existing #94784 body credit line for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94659.
